notify.title: Unexpected Find
notify.description: One of your entities stumbled upon something unusual while exploring the surface. It's not clear what it means — but it feels significant.

choices.label: Investigate
choices.consequence: +15 research to the finder — takes them off-duty for one cycle

choices.label: Share With Everyone
choices.consequence: +5 research all entities, +8 cohesion

choices.label: Ignore It
choices.consequence: Nothing happens

notify.title: A Leader Emerges
notify.description: One of your younger entities is showing remarkable natural authority. Others are already looking to them for guidance.

choices.label: Appoint as Leader
choices.consequence: +20 cohesion — that entity gains +10 diplomacy, -5 harvest

choices.label: Let It Happen Naturally
choices.consequence: +10 cohesion over time — slower but no forced stat changes

choices.label: Suppress the Influence
choices.consequence: Cohesion -10 — no leadership forms, entity loses morale

notify.title: The Harvest Song
notify.description: Your people have composed a song that spreads joy through the settlement. Even the warriors are humming it.

choices.label: Embrace the Tradition
choices.consequence: +15 cohesion, culture trait begins forming

choices.label: Teach the Children
choices.consequence: Future generations +5 base intelligence

choices.label: Let It Fade
choices.consequence: Nothing happens

notify.title: Ancient Ruins
notify.description: Your people discovered the remains of a civilization that came before yours. No one knows who they were.

choices.label: Excavate the Site
choices.consequence: +30 research — 2 entities off-duty for one cycle

choices.label: Build Over Them
choices.consequence: +20 construction efficiency — ruins lost forever

choices.label: Preserve and Study
choices.consequence: +10 research per cycle for 3 cycles — no immediate bonus

notify.title: The Dream
notify.description: Your most intelligent entity reports a vivid, recurring dream — of stars falling in a specific pattern, of a path through the cosmos.

choices.label: Record the Dream
choices.consequence: +20 research — may become relevant in era 4+

choices.label: Spread the Story
choices.consequence: +15 cohesion — entity seen as prophet, +5 diplomacy

choices.label: Dismiss It
choices.consequence: Nothing — for now

notify.title: Trading Opportunity
notify.description: A distant group has made contact and is offering goods in exchange for what you produce. The deal seems fair — on the surface.

choices.label: Trade Food Surplus
choices.consequence: +25 divine energy, -2 food buffer days

choices.label: Trade Knowledge
choices.consequence: +15 diplomacy all, -10 research

choices.label: Refuse the Deal
choices.consequence: +5 cohesion from isolationist pride — no material gain

notify.title: Child Prodigy
notify.description: A young entity born in your civilization is displaying abilities far beyond their age. The others don't know whether to revere or fear them.

choices.label: Nurture the Gift
choices.consequence: Entity gains +20 intelligence and a unique trait — costs 20 divine energy

choices.label: Integrate Normally
choices.consequence: Entity develops at natural pace — safe, no risks

choices.label: Isolate for Study
choices.consequence: Entity gains +30 research — cohesion -10, seen as experiment

notify.title: Comet Blessing
notify.description: A rare comet passes close to your planet, leaving a trail of cosmic dust and strange energy. Your people gaze up in wonder.

choices.label: Harvest Cosmic Dust
choices.consequence: +25 research, +20 divine energy — 2 entities off-duty

choices.label: Worship the Comet
choices.consequence: +30 cohesion — random entity gains Mystic trait

choices.label: Ignore It
choices.consequence: Comet passes — no bonus, no cost

notify.title: Great Harvest
notify.description: An unexpected abundance of resources has been found near the settlement. The population is celebrating.

choices.label: Store Reserves
choices.consequence: +3 food buffer days

choices.label: Expand Population
choices.consequence: Spawn one new entity — cohesion -5 from overcrowding

choices.label: Trade the Surplus
choices.consequence: +30 divine energy — food surplus lost

notify.title: Alien Probe
notify.description: A mechanical object of unknown origin has entered your atmosphere. It appears to be scanning your civilization.

choices.label: Study the Probe
choices.consequence: +40 research all — probe self-destructs, fragments remain

choices.label: Destroy It
choices.consequence: Safe — sender may detect hostile action

choices.label: Try to Communicate
choices.consequence: +20 diplomacy all — unknown response may follow

warning.title: Internal Conflict
warning.description: Two factions are forming within your civilization. Tensions are rising and violence could erupt at any moment.

choices.label: Mediate
choices.consequence: +15 cohesion, costs 20 divine energy

choices.label: Divide Territories
choices.consequence: -10 cohesion, -20% harvest — conflict stops

choices.label: Ignore
choices.consequence: Escalates — war likely next cycle

warning.title: Territorial Dispute
warning.description: Two groups within your settlement are fighting over the best land. The dispute is turning violent.

choices.label: Draw Borders
choices.consequence: +10 cohesion — harvest -10% from divided land

choices.label: Let Them Fight
choices.consequence: -15 health to fighters — winner gets all land, +20% harvest

choices.label: Redistribute Equally
choices.consequence: Costs 20 divine energy — both groups neutral

warning.title: Outsiders at the Gate
warning.description: A small group of strangers has arrived at your settlement. They carry different customs and unknown skills.

choices.label: Welcome Them
choices.consequence: New entity joins with random trait — cohesion -10 from cultural clash

choices.label: Turn Them Away
choices.consequence: Cohesion +5 — they may return as enemies

choices.label: Test Their Loyalty
choices.consequence: 50% join with bonus, 50% leave offended

warning.title: Food Shortage
warning.description: Stores are running low. The mood in the settlement is tense. If nothing is done, this shortage becomes a crisis within days.

choices.label: Expand Harvesting
choices.consequence: 2 entities switch to harvest duty — other stats drop temporarily

choices.label: Enforce Rationing
choices.consequence: -5 energy all — cohesion -8, crisis delayed 3 days

choices.label: Pray for Abundance
choices.consequence: Costs 25 divine energy — food buffer +2

warning.title: Warrior Restlessness
warning.description: Your warriors are bored. Too much peace has made them restless and aggressive. They are picking fights within the settlement.

choices.label: Send on Patrol
choices.consequence: +10 attack all warriors — 20% chance one gets injured

choices.label: Build a Training Arena
choices.consequence: Costs 30 construction — warriors gain +8 attack, cohesion improves

choices.label: Enforce Discipline
choices.consequence: Cohesion -15 — temporary calm, resentment builds

warning.title: The Elder is Dying
warning.description: Your oldest entity is fading. They have lived a long life, seen much, and carry wisdom that will be lost with them.

choices.label: Gather Their Wisdom
choices.consequence: +20 intelligence to one chosen entity — elder dies peacefully

choices.label: Try to Heal Them
choices.consequence: Costs 40 divine energy — 60% chance of success, 40% they die anyway

choices.label: Let Them Go
choices.consequence: Elder dies — +15 cohesion from shared mourning ritual

warning.title: Cultural Split
warning.description: Two distinct cultures have emerged within your civilization. They share the same land but no longer share the same values.

choices.label: Force Unity
choices.consequence: Cohesion +20 now, -5 per cycle until cause is resolved

choices.label: Allow Two Cultures
choices.consequence: Cohesion stabilizes at current value — diversity bonuses possible later

choices.label: Exile the Minority
choices.consequence: One entity leaves permanently — cohesion +25, population -1

warning.title: Prolonged Eclipse
warning.description: Something massive is blocking your sun. Crops are failing. Temperature is dropping. Your people are beginning to panic.

choices.label: Create Artificial Light
choices.consequence: Costs 35 divine energy — harvest -30% but entities safe

choices.label: Use Food Reserves
choices.consequence: No deaths — buffer drops to zero

choices.label: Perform Panic Rites
choices.consequence: Cohesion -25, random entity gains Mystic trait — eclipse ends sooner

warning.title: Strange Signal
warning.description: An unknown signal is reaching your planet from the outer cosmos. Its origin is unclear — it could be an opportunity or a warning.

choices.label: Analyze Signal
choices.consequence: +20 research all — source remains unknown

choices.label: Respond to Signal
choices.consequence: Unknown — could be first contact or a fatal mistake

choices.label: Ignore It
choices.consequence: Signal fades — nothing happens for now

warning.title: Approaching Star
warning.description: A rogue star is drifting dangerously close. Heat is rising across the planet. Without intervention, life becomes unsustainable.

choices.label: Lower Temperature
choices.consequence: Costs 40 divine energy — all safe

choices.label: Force Adaptation
choices.consequence: +10 health all, random stat shift ±5

choices.label: Build Heat Shields
choices.consequence: Costs 30 construction — -15 health temporary, long-term protection

critical.title: Warrior Uprising
critical.description: The warrior faction demands leadership. They are armed, organized, and will not wait much longer.

choices.label: Negotiate Power
choices.consequence: +15 cohesion, warriors gain partial control — attack +10 all

choices.label: Suppress by Force
choices.consequence: Warrior leader dies — attack -5 all, cohesion -20

choices.label: Yield Control
choices.consequence: Warriors take over — unknown long-term consequences

critical.title: Plague Outbreak
critical.description: A mysterious illness is spreading rapidly through your settlement. The sick are dying. The healthy are terrified.

choices.label: Enforce Quarantine
choices.consequence: -20 health infected, cohesion -15 — disease contained

choices.label: Treat Everyone
choices.consequence: Costs 50 divine energy — most survive, some permanent health loss

choices.label: Abandon the Sick
choices.consequence: Weakest 2 entities die — survivors gain disease immunity

critical.title: Food Crisis
critical.description: The harvest failed completely. Starvation is spreading. Every day without food brings your people closer to collapse.

choices.label: Enforce Rationing
choices.consequence: -10 health all — no deaths, crisis contained

choices.label: Sacrifice the Weak
choices.consequence: Weakest entity dies — others survive at full health

choices.label: Divine Intervention
choices.consequence: Costs 40 divine energy — crisis resolved instantly

critical.title: Incoming Meteorite
critical.description: A large meteorite is on a collision course with your planet. Impact is imminent. One full surface layer will be devastated.

choices.label: Deflect It
choices.consequence: Costs 60 divine energy — meteorite destroyed

choices.label: Evacuate the Layer
choices.consequence: All entities moved — layer destroyed, entities survive

choices.label: Accept Fate
choices.consequence: All entities on hit layer perish — crater becomes permanent

critical.title: Solar Flare
critical.description: A massive energy burst erupts from your star. Electronics fail. Navigation is blind. Radiation is intense.

choices.label: Go Underground
choices.consequence: -10 health all — survive, tech disrupted 1 cycle

choices.label: Harvest the Energy
choices.consequence: +50 divine energy — 30% chance one entity dies from radiation

choices.label: Build Shielding
choices.consequence: Costs 40 construction — full protection, no health loss

critical.title: Cosmic Tide
critical.description: Gravitational forces from a passing body are warping your planet's surface. Floods and fissures are forming across multiple layers.

choices.label: Evacuate Affected Layers
choices.consequence: Entities survive — two layers lose all structures

choices.label: Build Barriers
choices.consequence: Costs 45 construction — half damage absorbed, some health loss

choices.label: Anchor Down
choices.consequence: -20 health all — no structural loss

critical.title: Mass Exodus
critical.description: A large portion of your population wants to leave. They have lost faith in the civilization's future and are preparing to go.

choices.label: Stop the Exodus
choices.consequence: Costs 50 divine energy — they stay, deeply resentful, cohesion -10

choices.label: Let Them Go
choices.consequence: Lose 1-2 entities — remaining ones gain cohesion +20 from relief

choices.label: Offer Them Hope
choices.consequence: +25 cohesion — you must deliver on the promise or they leave next cycle

critical.title: Ice Age Onset
critical.description: Temperatures across the planet are dropping at an alarming rate. Ice is spreading from the poles. Your civilization has days to adapt.

choices.label: Mass Migration
choices.consequence: All entities move to warmer layers — 3 layers become uninhabitable

choices.label: Stockpile Resources
choices.consequence: +5 food buffer — -20 health all from cold, entities survive

choices.label: Force Adaptation
choices.consequence: Costs 60 divine energy — all entities gain cold resistance permanently

critical.title: Leadership Vacuum
critical.description: With so few left, no one is in charge. Decisions aren't being made. Resources aren't being allocated. The civilization is drifting.

choices.label: Appoint the Strongest
choices.consequence: Strongest entity leads — attack +15, diplomacy -10

choices.label: Shared Rule
choices.consequence: Cohesion +20 — decisions are slower, -10% all output

choices.label: Let Chaos Reign
choices.consequence: Random outcomes each cycle until population grows again

critical.title: Knowledge Heist
critical.description: Someone has stolen the accumulated research of your civilization. All records, all progress — gone. The thief is still inside your settlement.

choices.label: Hunt the Thief
choices.consequence: 70% success: research recovered. 30%: thief escapes with it.

choices.label: Rebuild from Memory
choices.consequence: -50% research all — recovered slowly over 5 cycles

choices.label: Accept the Loss
choices.consequence: Research resets — cohesion +10 from solidarity in adversity

fatal.title: Black Hole Approaching
fatal.description: A black hole is drifting into your system. Gravity is bending light. Time is distorting. Escape seems impossible.

choices.label: Attempt Escape
choices.consequence: Costs everything — planet moves, civilization survives with nothing

choices.label: Resist the Pull
choices.consequence: Half your entities are lost — survivors gain extraordinary abilities

choices.label: Embrace the Void
choices.consequence: Triggers prestige — civilization transcends into the black hole

fatal.title: Civil War
fatal.description: Your civilization has fractured completely. Armed groups are fighting in the streets. There is no negotiating now — only survival.

choices.label: Back the Strongest Side
choices.consequence: War ends — losing side's entities die, winner gains full control

choices.label: Force a Ceasefire
choices.consequence: Costs 80 divine energy — both sides disarmed, cohesion 30

choices.label: Let It Burn
choices.consequence: Most entities die — only the strongest survives, starts over alone

fatal.title: Extinction Virus
fatal.description: A pathogen unlike any seen before is killing your people with terrifying speed. There is no natural immunity. Time is running out.

choices.label: Burn the Infected
choices.consequence: Infected entities die — survivors sealed, 50% survival rate

choices.label: Force Mass Mutation
choices.consequence: Costs 70 divine energy — all stats randomize, 80% survive with new traits

choices.label: Accept the End
choices.consequence: All entities perish — civilization ends, prestige is triggered

fatal.title: Nearby Supernova
fatal.description: A star in your system is dying. The explosion will send a shockwave of radiation and debris directly through your planet's orbit.

choices.label: Build an Ark
choices.consequence: Costs everything — saves all entities, planet destroyed, new start

choices.label: Build Deep Bunkers
choices.consequence: Costs 80 construction — 4 layers destroyed, bunker layers survive

choices.label: Harness the Explosion
choices.consequence: +100 divine energy — 40% of entities die from radiation exposure

fatal.title: The Gods Are Silent
fatal.description: Your divine energy has collapsed to zero. The connection to the cosmos is severed. Your people feel utterly alone — and they are right.

choices.label: Make a Great Sacrifice
choices.consequence: One entity chosen and sacrificed — divine connection restored, +60 energy

choices.label: Rebuild Faith Slowly
choices.consequence: +5 divine energy per cycle for 10 cycles — slow, but no loss

choices.label: Embrace Self-Reliance
choices.consequence: Divine energy disabled permanently — all stats +15, no more god powers
